name: factiq
description: Answer economic and financial data questions with FactIQ MCP tools, publish shareable charts and reports, or build bespoke local HTML visualizations.

interface.longDescription: Use FactIQ MCP tools to discover economic and financial series, query read-only SQL, compute metrics, publish shareable charts or research reports, or build bespoke local HTML visualizations.
defaultPrompt: Make a report on US electricity demand
